message:
fix(test): align pause transition test with Paused state implementation

mission_pause_transition_plan() returns State::Paused (not Blocked) for
active missions. The test assertion was stale. Also added coverage for
Paused idempotency and Paused→resume paths. Includes other agents'
uncommitted mission CLI and tx tool additions needed for the full 267-test
suite to pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
